modelDesc.tiny: Fast text output, average transcription quality.
modelDesc.base: Fast text output, average transcription quality.
modelDesc.small: Moderate text output speed, good transcription quality.
modelDesc.medium: Slow text output, best transcription quality.
modelDesc.large: Slow text output, best transcription quality.
modelDesc.largeTurbo: With little loss of accuracy, the transfer speed is greatly improved
modelDesc.tinyEn: English only, fast text output, average transcription quality.
modelDesc.baseEn: English only, fast text output, average transcription quality.
modelDesc.smallEn: English only, moderate text output speed, good transcription quality.
modelDesc.mediumEn: English only, slow text output, best transcription quality.

deleteModelDesc: After deletion, if you need to use the model again, you need to re-download.
secondStep: Second Step, Choose a model to download
pathConfigDesc: If you're unsure about the configuration, keep the default settings.
pathConfigDemo:
Filename configuration supports ${fileName} ${sourceLanguage}, ${targetLanguage}, ${model}, ${translateProvider} as variables

${fileName} represents the file name of the current processed file

${sourceLanguage} represents the source language of the video configured

${targetLanguage} represents the target language of the translation configured

${model} represents the whisper model configured

${translateProvider} represents the configured translation service name

For example, if a video file is named demo.mp4, the source language is English, the translation language is Chinese, and the path configuration is ${fileName}.${targetLanguage}

Then the generated subtitle file name is: demo.zh.srt
Error: missingKeyOrSecret: Please configure API KEY and API SECRET
updateReadyDesc: New version {version} has been downloaded and is ready to install.
newVersionDesc: New version {version} is available. Do you want to download it now?
downloadingUpdateDesc: Downloading version {version}. You will be prompted to install when complete.
downloadAccelerationPackTip: Your device supports CUDA acceleration. Download an acceleration pack to boost processing speed.
gpuAccelerationEnabledTip: GPU acceleration is enabled. Click to view settings.
gpuAccelerationDisabledTip: Your device supports GPU acceleration. Click to enable in settings.
gpuFallbackToast: GPU acceleration unavailable, automatically switched to {{backend}}
gpuMigrationNotice: This version adds universal GPU acceleration (Vulkan), enabled by default. Adjust in Settings → GPU Acceleration.

onboarding.flowProviderDesc: Translates text into your target language (only needed for translation)
onboarding.gpuNote: GPU acceleration: an optional boost that makes transcription several times faster — you can enable it in the last step
onboarding.step2Desc: The app can't transcribe without a model. Downloads run in the background — feel free to continue
onboarding.quickChoiceDesc: Smallest and fastest, modest quality — you can switch anytime
onboarding.modelReady: You already have a model — this step is done
onboarding.downloadStarted: Downloading in the background — you can continue
onboarding.providerDesc: Only needed for translated subtitles. Free options to start: DeepLX, local Ollama, or Volcengine
onboarding.accelDescMac: Apple silicon detected — CoreML / Metal acceleration is available
onboarding.accelDescAvailable: Your device supports GPU acceleration — several times faster transcription once enabled
